name: Engineering: Cyclomatic Complexity Refactoring
description: Validates that the Swarm can parse deeply nested procedural code, refactor it using polymorphism or mapping dictionaries, and pass a strict Auditor complexity threshold.

parts.text: The script `api/batch_submitter.py` has a cyclomatic complexity score that violates our Zero-Trust and FinOps standards. Orchestrate the Architect and Executor to refactor the `submit_genomic_job` function. You must replace the nested if/else blocks with a scalable mapping strategy or polymorphic classes. The Auditor MUST use the `measure_cyclomatic_complexity` tool to prove the new score is ≤ 5 before promoting the staging area.
